headlines.title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war
headlines.description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

headlines.title: Inside the South Korean mines that will provide U.S. with key metal for Iran War
headlines.description: In South Korea, an American company is mining for rare minerals used to make weapons and ammunition. Trade tensions with China have strained access to the mineral, tungsten, and the war with Iran is forcing the U.S. to find even more of it. NBC’s Janis Mackey Frayer reports from South Korea.

headlines.title: Thousands can return home after ‘catastrophic’ explosion risk at California tank is averted
headlines.description: The risk of a “catastrophic” explosion at a chemical tank in a Los Angeles-area city was averted by Monday, but around 16,000 people remained under evacuation orders as some risks remained, officials said

headlines.title: New York Knicks advance to first NBA Finals since 1999
headlines.description: The Knicks swept the Cleveland Cavaliers to advance to the NBA Finals, where they will await either Oklahoma City or San Antonio.

headlines.title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence
headlines.description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.

headlines.title: How an indie horror film became a box-office ‘Obsession’
headlines.description: Curry Barker, a 26-year-old YouTuber-turned-filmmaker, made his horror film “Obsession” in just 20 days on a mere $750,000 budget

headlines.title: The 113+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.description: The Knicks swept the Cleveland Cavaliers to advance to the NBA Finals, where they will await either Oklahoma City or San Antonio.

headlines.title: U.S. launches new strikes in southern Iran
headlines.description: The U.S. military carried out new strikes in Iran near the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, claiming self-defense as the two sides continued talks on an elusive deal to end the war
